intent_precise:
Nextera DNA Flex NGS Library Prep: Post Tagmentation \
Cleanup: Using mag_plate (pcr_plate, slot 1), reagent reservoir (reservoir, slot 3). With magnetic module. (1) Engage magnets at 18mm height for bead separation. (2) Incubate for 3 minutes. (3) Transfer 65µL from source A1 to liquid_waste 0. (4) Disengage magnets to release beads. (5) Transfer 100µL from twb A1 to destination. (6) Mix 10 times at 80µL. (7) Engage magnets at 18mm height for bead separation. (8) Incubate for 3 minutes. (9) Transfer 120µL from source A1 to liquid_waste A1.
intent_concise: Perform magnetic bead separation. (volumes 65µL-120µL, ~6 min total)
intent: For the Nextera DNA Flex NGS Library Prep post tagmentation cleanup, you'll be working with the PCR plate in slot 1 and the reagent reservoir in slot 3 using the magnetic module. Start by engaging the magnets at 18mm height and let the beads separate for 3 minutes, then remove 65µL of supernatant from well A1 to liquid waste. Next, disengage the magnets and add 100µL of TWB from reservoir A1 to the sample, mixing 10 times at 80µL volume to resuspend the beads thoroughly. Finally, engage the magnets again at 18mm height, wait another 3 minutes for bead separation, and transfer 120µL of the supernatant from A1 to liquid waste A1 to complete the cleanup.

output_schema.protocol_name:
Nextera DNA Flex NGS Library Prep: Post Tagmentation \
Cleanup
output_schema.author: Nick <protocols@opentrons.com>

commands.message: Seal the plate, and keep on the magnetic module. The TWB remains in the wells to prevent overdrying of the beads
